name: alpha-core
description: AHI Governance Alpha Engine - Kintsugnosis Edition - Powered by Genkit & Vertex AI
author: AHI 3.0 & Sovereign Symbiosis Foundation

scripts.test:ci: npx firebase experiments:enable webframeworks && cross-env FIREBASE_CONFIG='{"projectId":"kintsugnosis-ahi"}' firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project kintsugnosis-ahi "node scripts/verify_contract.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --project kintsugnosis-ahi
